message:
test(repair): add 19 edge-case tests for storage and recovery modules (bd-1t0u)

storage.rs: 12 new tests (5→17) covering layout validation edge cases,
generation regression rejection, empty descriptor handling, bootstrap
generation-0 path, multi-generation upgrades, and symbol input validation.

recovery.rs: 7 new tests (6→13) covering noop recovery, index dedup,
out-of-range indices, absolute-to-relative block mapping, source range
validation, and evidence serialization round-trip for partial outcomes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
